feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Would it be possible for you to help me with the following question:- the Baltimore Root
entry.content:
Good afternoon,
Would it be possible for you to help me with the following question:
- the Baltimore CyberTrust Root Certificate that I have in the Integration Suite will expire, but according to SAP note 3565626 it will no longer be renewed.
How then to proceed in the case of the Integration Suite?
If I already have DigiCert Global Root CA and DigiCert Global Root G2 Certificates, do I need to take any extra action?
I would appreciate a certain urgency
Thank you very much in advance

entry.title: How can we push data from SAP Group Reporting to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using Integration Suite?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently working on a use case where we need to push financial data from SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), and we would like to use SAP Integration Suite as the middleware platform for this integration.

We’re looking for guidance on the following points:

  1. Is there a standard or recommended approach to push Group Reporting data to SAC via Integration Suite?

  2. Are there any predefined integration flows (iFlows), APIs, or connectors that support this scenario?

  3. How can we handle authentication and connectivity between Group Reporting, Integration Suite, and SAC?

  4. how can we configure the connection to ensure tenant compatibility (e.g., eu10.analytics.cloud.sap)?

If you have documentation, sample configurations, or experience with a similar use case, your input would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Can SAP Integration Suite Push Data to S/4HANA On-Premise via JDBC Adapter?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am currently working on a data integration process where I need to fetch data from a third-party system, perform some transformations within SAP Integration Suite, and then insert the data into an on-premise S/4HANA database using the JDBC adapter.

Would this be a feasible approach?

For reference, the workflow looks like this:

📁 CSV File → SAP Integration Suite → (JDBC Adapter) → SAP S/4HANA DB (On-Premise)

I understand that OData adapter is the more common approach, but we are currently exploring alternative ways to exchange data between Integration Suite and S/4HANA DB.

Has anyone successfully implemented a similar solution? Any insights or recommendations would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you! 😊

entry.title: AEAD is not getting disabled
entry.content: Even after disabling the AEAD, when we are checking by gpg --list-packets <filename> still it exists, it is showing as prefix for AEAD as O2.

entry.title: Is it possible to autoscale Integration Suite in BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi SAP CPI Expert team,

 

Our team is using SAP Integration Suite in the SAP BTP Cloud Foundry environment, and
currently the integration traffic is nearing the tenant's capacity limit; We're exploring options to handle this scalability challenge.
I would like to know if SAP Integration Suite can be automatically scaled to manage increased load. I've seen the previous question here Maximum Number of Messages for SAP Cloud Platform ... - SAP Community where Elijah said dynamic resource autoscaling was on the roadmap. Is this feature now implemented? If not, what are the recommended alternatives for auto-scaling?
 
Best
Joshua

entry.title: Unable to Activate Agreement in B2B Scenarios
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I created a MIG with a custom X12 structure. When I tried to use this in trading partner agreement and activate it , I am getting the below error.

Error was : Failed to publish Message Implementation Guideline with id e4147ff852204af8902494b688e8b75c to Partner Directory. Error was : Error executing [PUSH_TO_PD] on service [SAP Integration Advisor]. Response was [Code: 500, Reason : Internal Server Error : {"errorCode":"FAILED_TO_PUSH_ARTIFACT_TO_CPI","errorMessage":"Destination it-cpi034_CPI_DEST could not be loaded."}]

Can anyone please help ?

entry.title: SAP API Management using Entra and OAuth 2.0
entry.content:
Good Morning Community! I was wondering if anyone had experience in attempting to leverage Entra AD (Microsoft Azure) as a source of authentication and bearer token issuance within API Management. I am attempting to use the following as a basis for my trials, but am finding some gaps in the actual setup and build out. Any assistance would be greatly appreciated!

Utilising Third-Party OAuth Tokens in SAP API Mana... - SAP Community

entry.title: Recovery of credential from SAP INTEGRATION SUITE
entry.content:
Hello Community of Integration Developers,

Recently, I faced a challenge when my SSH keys were accidentally deleted from the IS tenant. Despite my efforts, I was unable to recover them myself and was only able to retrieve the keys from a colleague. This situation raised an important question: While we store credentials daily in Security Material, Key Store, and PGP Keys, where exactly are these stored? Are they saved on SAP’s proprietary servers?

If any of these credentials are accidentally deleted, what options do we have for recovery? Is there a backup or recovery mechanism provided by SAP for such scenarios?

I would appreciate any insights or best practices regarding credential recovery in SAP Integration Suite.

Thank you.

SAP Integration Suite SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Cloud Connector access to AL11 directory
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need your help to understand how to get the internal host of SFTP?

--Symptom--

  • We created few folders in AL11 directory, now we need to fetch the data from that folder to CPI via cloud connector to S4HANA Private Cloud. 
  • The blog is followed:
    https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/step-by-step-procedure-to-establish-cpi-to-sftp-server-connection/ba-p/13520842

 

For Cloud Integration to access file storage, you must expose the file storage using FTP or SFTP protocol, by setting up FTP or SFTP service (as Server).

But how to get the internal host of SFTP?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Getting ICMENOSESSION error while calling SAP S4 webservice from SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We are working on scenarios in SAP CPI to call SAP S4 webservice to get the data in request/reply way. There are multiple calls happening to S4 webservice using SOAP 1.x receiver adapter.

FLOW:  SAP CPI <-> SAP SCC <-> SAP S4 (on-prem)

Modernize RFC Receiver Communications into API-Based Protocols in Cloud Integration. Link to understand the scenario in details: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/modernize-rfc-receiver.html

In S4, webservice is linked to function module based on the request payload we are sending from CPI function module is getting executed based on the logic written in it then giving back the response immediately.

Problem statement:

  • Webservice calls are getting executed successfully for few initial calls. Some of the execution whole integration is getting executed successfully without failure.
    But sometimes suddenly getting failed with error: "org.apache.cxf.interceptor.Fault: Could not send Message., cause: org.apache.cxf.transport.http.HTTPException: HTTP response '400: Bad Request. <!-- This error page was generated by ICM (-)! -->
    <!-- Error code: ICMENOSESSION "
  • We are not able to see any logs in SRT_MONI or SXMB_MONI about this failure in S4. Also tried to check in SRT_UTIL but no luck.

From our end we have tried to execute the integration by doing multiple changes:

  • Made HTTP session reuse 'none' in CPI and enableSession parameter false in S4 wsdl setting. (KBA:

    https://me.sap.com/notes/0003419590)

  • Also tried to remove allow chunking in SAP CPI SOAP adapter configuration.
  • All cases we are throwing same error.

Please suggest further if you also encountered similar kind of issues. let me know possible resolution of this issue.

Regards,

Souvik

entry.title: Cannot reach s4dhost.wdf.sap.corp . "error code: 503; Message : Service Unavailable"
entry.content:
Hi

I am taking course "SAP Integration Suite". In chapter "Creating an API Provider" at https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-with-sap-integration-suite/creating-an-api-provider_b95113e7-369f-4dd3-9773-ec4e0fde2e00 I create an API Provider.

My configuration in Connection is:
Host: s4dhost.wdf.sap.corp
Port: 8080
Location ID : st-u45s-cld900dev
Authentication : none
sap-client : 100

My configuration in Catalog Service Settings is:
Path prefix: /sap/opu/odata
Service Collection URL : /IWFND/CATALOGSERVISE;=2/ServiceCollection
Catalog URL : http://s4dhost.wdf.sap.corp:8080/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVISE;=2/ServiceCollection
Authentication type : BASIC
Username: <my email-user>  <- I also tried with my SAP ID : "P1......" . Same error
Password : <...>


When I test connection I get error : "Connection to the system was unsuccessful with HTTP response code: 503; Message : Service Unavailable"


Can You help me point out where the error reside in my configuration?

 

/Regards

Joakim

entry.title: Can the AS-2 adapter configured in CPI using Sender AS-2 adapter without the TPM.
entry.content: This is to receive EDI files from clients.

entry.title: useOneAsMany leaving out one node in target
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I have this source structure-

<Orders>
<Order>
<OrderNumber>ORD001</OrderNumber>
<CustomerID>CUST001</CustomerID>
<Item>
<SKU>SKU1</SKU>
<Qty>2</Qty>
</Item>
<Item>
<SKU>SKU2</SKU>
<Qty>5</Qty>
</Item>
</Order>
<Order>
<OrderNumber>ORD002</OrderNumber>
<CustomerID>CUST002</CustomerID>
<Item>
<SKU>SKU3</SKU>
<Qty>1</Qty>
</Item>
</Order>
</Orders>

that I need to map to the following target

<OrderLines>
<Line>
<OrderNum>ORD001</OrderNum>
<Customer>CUST001</Customer>
<SKU>SKU1</SKU>
<Qty>2</Qty>
</Line>
<Line>
<OrderNum>ORD001</OrderNum>
<Customer>CUST001</Customer>
<SKU>SKU2</SKU>
<Qty>5</Qty>
</Line>
<Line>
<OrderNum>ORD002</OrderNum>
<Customer>CUST002</Customer>
<SKU>SKU3</SKU>
<Qty>1</Qty>
</Line>
</OrderLines>

I am using useOneAsMany in the graphical mapping to achieve this. In will attach screenshots of the mapping. The <Line> is mapped to the <Item>. But the output is missing the final <Line>, this one-

<Line>
<OrderNum>ORD002</OrderNum>
<Customer>CUST002</Customer>
<SKU>SKU3</SKU>
<Qty>1</Qty>
</Line>

I am not quite sure what is going wrong. I am fairly new to using node functions. Please help me out. Thank You.

entry.title: Coupa API for Image scan, PDF read failing to convert the binary data to PDF
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am trying to fetch a PDF from Coupa using API call using the Coupa Adapter. The API call provides me a Binary encoded file with UTF-8 format. I am able to create a PDF but this comes as a blank. I have referred most of the blogs to convert the binary to byte and to base64 string and so on but none of it resolves this issue. 

Any suggestions are appreciated.

entry.title: AzureStorage Fileshare Storage dynamic file name based on property
entry.content:
iflow receives multiple files and based on the file names I required to post the files to respective folder path of AzureStorage using FileShare for which I could use the router option, but when writing the file's dynamically based on the file name property is not working and getting exception on my receiver connector

/filesharepoc/Inbound/ReceiveFiles/${property.sourceFilename}

java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: String index out of range: -1

but if I maintained the target file name as : /filesharepoc/Inbound/ReceiveFiles/test.txt which works

entry.title: I am simulating a jms queue using 2 iflows in SAP integration suite
entry.content:
I am simulating a jms queue using 2 iflows in SAP integration suite, one will send the data in a xml say ten records, which will have general spiltter that will split into single record and send to jms queue through sender adapter to second iflow, which will process and send the data to  an API http://123.133.1XX.111:5000/create_event through http adapter , I tested that by stopping the http://123.133.1XX.111:5000 server and test whether the data 10 records are there in jms queue  and is retrying.

The HTTP call with request reply is failing as the target system is  down (http://123.133.1XX.111:5000), but the data is not in the jms queue, it is only coming when there is duplicate datastore error or any error in the iflow steps , external call failure of http is not making the 10 records go in jms queue, I am achieving that by forcing  a error from a groovy from the exception sub process, like this
def errorMessage = message.getProperty("CamelExceptionCaught")?.toString()

if (errorMessage?.contains("Connection refused") ||
errorMessage?.contains("Read timed out") ||
errorMessage?.contains("500")) {
message.setProperty("sendToJMS", true);
throw new RuntimeException("Forced retry due to external system down");
} else {
message.setProperty("sendToJMS", false);
}

 

Is this the normal behaviour, please advise.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Load balancer for multiple SAP integration suite tenant
entry.content: Hi Experts, We are currently facing performance bottlenecks with our SAP Integration Suite tenant. We are exploring options to optimize performance or implement disaster recovery by provisioning additional instances. We came across a three-year-old SAP Community post Maximum Number of Messages for SAP Cloud Platform Integration indicating that Autoscaler Service support for SAP Integration Suite was on the roadmap. but not clear if this functionality has been implemented, If so, is there any guidance or documentation on how to configure the Autoscaler Service with SAP Integration Suite to enable automatic scaling based on workload or to support multi-instance disaster recovery. If this feature is not yet available, could you recommend alternative methods to address performance bottlenecks or achieve disaster recovery for SAP Integration Suite on BTP? For exam, is there any solution about the load balancer implemented for multiple CPI tenant regarding the external requests control? Any answer will be warm welcome. thanks in advance. Regards, Grady

entry.title: SAP Free tier limitations for Integration suite
entry.content:
Hi,

Referring to the SAP Note: https://me.sap.com/notes/2903776.

Need few information's regarding the Free Tier Service Plan for SAP Cloud Integration.

1. How many interfaces can be developed in the Free Tier Service Plan?

2. Does the Free Tier support Best Effort Communication mode (Synchronous Communication)?

3. What is the message volume that is permitted in the free tier service plan?

4. What are the other limitations in using the free tier service plan ?

Regards,

Senthil

entry.title: custom headers are not working in monitoring with wildcard charcters in sap cpi
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have a requirement to store the salesforce ID values for each Salesorg, I have used addCustomHeaders function to store the values.

Since i get many records from salesforce all the ID values are stroed in CSV, during message monitoring i am unable to retrieve the message based on single ID value.

I tried giving * after the ID value, but still it was not showing the message with this search .
if i give the entire value i am able to see the message

can you help me how i could search with one ID if i have many ID values stored in custom header


Regards,
Saikumar

entry.title: Problem in a Flow between the GeneralSplitter appliance and the Aggregator
entry.content:
Hello dears,
I have a problem in a Flow between the GeneralSplitter appliance and the Aggregator,
there are two messages:

1.- In the Aggregator
GeneralSplitter may not pass XML message to Aggregator,Aggregator supports XML only

2.-At Flow Level
The Process requiere a transaction because aggregator is used. Set transacction handling to Requiered for JDBC


The message you are sending between the GeneralSplitter and the Aggregator are these three XML


<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Inventory>
<Car>
<Id>1</Id>
<Brand>Renault</Brand>
<Model>Captur</Model>
<Year>2021</Year>
<Color>Azul</Color>
</Car>
</Inventory>

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Inventory>
<Car>
<Id>8</Id>
<Brand>Renault</Brand>
<Model>Prado</Model>
<Year>2021</Year>
<Color>Negro</Color>
</Car>
</Inventory>


<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Inventory>
<Car>
<Id>3</Id>
<Brand>Renault</Brand>
<Model>Prado</Model>
<Year>2021</Year>
<Color>Azul</Color>
</Car>
</Inventory>


Any help, thank you very much in advance Manos.
Regards,
Roberto Bahamondes Flores
